current_environment.note: Driver/kernel update broke NCCL IB auto-detect; required manual GID_INDEX fix

nccl_ib_fix.before: NCCL TCP Socket fallback (424us per 16KB all-reduce)

moe_padding_fix.change: compute_aligned_M() tighter bound: min(M*topk, local_experts) instead of local_experts
moe_padding_fix.reduction: 21x less MoE GEMM work at c=1 decode

analysis.remaining_gap: 3.5x below published (11 vs 38 tok/s) due to environmental regression
analysis.root_cause_of_gap: Kernel 1014->1021 and/or driver 580.142->580.159.03 introduced compute regression in DeepGEMM/TileLang JIT kernels
analysis.gpu_compute_health: BF16 GEMM: 85.9 TFLOPS, Memory BW: 175 GB/s (healthy)
analysis.note: MoE fix would push published 38->55+ tok/s once environmental regression is resolved
